state_machine.note: Only verify.sh may transition a feature to 'passing'

features.title: Product Catalog — List & Search
features.description: Product list screen with search, status filter chips. Calls GET /api/catalog/products.
acceptance: Empty state shown when no results
Error state shown with retry button

features.title: Product Detail
features.description: Product detail screen showing all fields. Calls GET /api/catalog/products/{id}.
acceptance: Delete button deactivates product and navigates back

features.title: Create Product
features.description: FAB on list screen opens dialog. Calls POST /api/catalog/products.
acceptance: New product appears in list after creation

features.title: Delete / Deactivate Product
features.description: Delete from list or detail screen. Calls DELETE /api/catalog/products/{id}.
acceptance: Product removed/greyed in list after deactivation
